parameters.command:
=TMP_FILE='{{ $('Validate Request').item.json.tmpFile }}'
if command -v n8n >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  if n8n export:credentials --all --decrypted --output="$TMP_FILE" >/tmp/ndeploy-export.log 2>&1; then
    cat "$TMP_FILE"
    rm -f "$TMP_FILE"
  elif n8n export:credentials --backup --decrypted --output="$TMP_FILE" >/tmp/ndeploy-export.log 2>&1; then
    cat "$TMP_FILE"
    rm -f "$TMP_FILE"
  else
    rm -f "$TMP_FILE"
    printf '{"error":"credential_export_failed","code":"INTERNAL_ERROR","details":{"reason":"n8n_cli_export_failed","command":"n8n export:credentials"}}'
  fi
else
  printf '{"error":"credential_export_failed","code":"INTERNAL_ERROR","details":{"reason":"n8n_cli_not_found"}}'
fi
